name: Bobbies Smoked Salmon, Cucumber and Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 to 4 ounces thin spaghetti, cooked/drained - rinsed under cool water - drained again
1 cup leaf lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
1 or 2 green onions with some of the tops, sliced
1/4 cup fat-free or low-fat sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in boiling salted water.
2. Meanwhile, combine the rest of the salad ingredients in a medium bowl, reserving a few flakes of salmon for garnish.
3. In a small bowl, combine the dressing ingredients.
4. Mix cooled pasta with the rest of the salad ingredients. Add dressing and toss lightly to mix.
5. Garnish with reserved salmon flakes, tomatoes, and parsley.
6. Chill. Remove from refrigerator 10 minutes before serving time.
